proposal1.heroHeadline: Ascender is losing 300 hours a year on proposal creation. Here's how to stop it.
proposal1.heroSubheadline: Creating proposals for strategy, creative, and communication services manually is time-consuming. With automated AI, it's done in 47 seconds.
proposal1.problemsIntro: Each issue below represents a significant leak in your time and resources.

problems.title: Wasted Team Hours
problems.description: Ascender spends over 200 hours annually on proposal writing. That's time not spent on creative execution or client strategy development.

problems.title: Lost Deals
problems.description: Delayed proposals lead to missed opportunities. Each day waiting for a proposal is a day your competition gets ahead.

problems.title: Inconsistent Branding
problems.description: Manual processes risk inconsistent proposals that dilute your brand. Every inconsistency chips away at the 'big thinking' image of Ascender.

problems.title: High Opportunity Cost
problems.description: For every proposal written, potential client engagements are postponed. Each hour spent writing proposals is an hour not spent solving client problems.

problems.title: Resource Drain
problems.description: Producing proposals pulls valuable resources away from billable work. This costs Ascender thousands in potential revenue each year.

problems.title: Stress and Burnout
problems.description: Constantly crafting proposals by hand leads to employee burnout. High stress levels reduce overall productivity and creativity.

proposal1.solutionIntro: Our AI system is the answer to these ongoing losses.

solutions.title: Instant Proposal Generation
solutions.description: Currently, proposals take hours of manual effort. Our AI generates them in under 60 seconds, freeing up your team.

solutions.title: Consistent Branding
solutions.description: Manual processes risk inconsistency. Our system ensures every proposal is perfectly on-brand, every time.

solutions.title: Real-Time Tracking
solutions.description: Without tracking, you miss valuable insights. Our system provides real-time data on proposal engagement, so you know when to follow up.

solutions.title: AI Chatbot Assistance
solutions.description: Currently, client questions slow down the process. Our AI chatbot handles inquiries instantly, keeping the momentum going.

solutions.title: Focus on Core Services
solutions.description: Time-consuming proposals detract from your core services. With automation, your team can focus on strategy and creative work.

proposal1.whyUsIntro: Four reasons this works. Not marketing claims. Engineering facts.

whyUsCards.title: Speed
whyUsCards.description: Every hour your team spends writing proposals is an hour not spent closing deals. This system gives those hours back. Lead data in, live proposal out, 60 seconds.

whyUsCards.title: Personalization
whyUsCards.description: Generic proposals get ignored. Personalized proposals close. The system reads each prospect's website and reflects their services, tone, and positioning back to them. Written from scratch, not templated.

whyUsCards.title: Ownership
whyUsCards.description: No monthly subscription bleeding your budget. No vendor deciding to raise prices or shut down. You own the source code, the infrastructure, and the data. Permanently.

whyUsCards.title: Support
whyUsCards.description: Personal onboarding, a video walkthrough your team can reference anytime, and one week of post-delivery support. You are not left figuring this out alone.

fearCards.title: You are probably thinking: our stack is complicated.
fearCards.sub: CRM, email, Sheets, Slack. The system connects to whatever you already use. No migration.

fearCards.title: You might be wondering if this breaks your current workflow.
fearCards.sub: It runs alongside everything you have. Nothing changes except the time you spend on proposals.

fearCards.title: You are concerned the output will not match your standards.
fearCards.sub: Revisions are part of the build. We configure, test, and refine until the output matches your bar exactly.

proposal1.teamIntro: Your point of contact. No handoffs, no account managers, no layers.

team.name: Ayush Chauhan
team.bio: Full-stack engineer specializing in AI automation for agencies and service businesses. Every engagement personally handled from architecture through deployment. 15+ systems built. Zero failed deliveries. Works async, ships fast.

proposal1.processIntro: What Working With Us Looks Like

process.title: Kickoff (Async or Call)
process.description: We map your workflow, services, and current proposal process. Can be a 15-minute call or handled entirely over email. By the end, we have everything needed to configure the system.

process.title: System Configuration
process.description: The engine gets configured with your services, pricing structure, tone of voice, and brand standards. Every proposal it generates will sound like your best strategist wrote it.

process.title: Build and QA
process.description: Test proposals generated and reviewed against your quality bar. Refinements continue until the output is indistinguishable from what your team produces manually.

process.title: Deployment and Handoff
process.description: Deployed to production with full infrastructure. You receive a video walkthrough, documentation, and complete source code. From this point, the system runs without us.

proposal1.pricingIntro: Two options. Both are one-time builds. No subscriptions, no recurring fees. You own the source code and infrastructure permanently.

pricing.name: Proposal Engine
pricing.subtitle: // Core System
pricing.description: Custom proposal automation configured for Ascender's services, voice, and pricing structure.

pricing.name: Engine + AI Chatbot
pricing.subtitle: // Recommended
pricing.description: Everything above, plus an AI sales assistant embedded in every proposal. Handles objections, answers questions, and books calls for Ascender around the clock.
features: AI chatbot on every proposal page

proposal1.ctaHeadline: See this running on your actual proposals.
proposal1.ctaDescription: Reply here or email Ayush directly. He will send the onboarding form. Takes about 10 minutes and the build starts the same day. Custom-configured for Ascender.

proposal2.heroHeadline: Elevate Acme Corp's Brand Visibility with Ascender's Expertise
proposal2.heroSubheadline: We're ready to transform Acme Corp's brand with a strategic, creative, and tech-driven approach.
proposal2.problemsIntro: Every day Acme Corp is losing potential revenue due to untapped opportunities.

problems.title: Lack of Brand Awareness
problems.description: Acme Corp is losing potential customers daily because they simply don't know you exist. Increasing brand visibility by 20% could enhance market share significantly.

problems.title: Inconsistent Brand Messaging
problems.description: Inconsistent messaging results in confused customers. This can lead to a 15% decrease in customer loyalty and trust.

problems.title: Outdated Website
problems.description: A slow, outdated website can lead to a 25% bounce rate increase, driving potential customers away.

problems.title: Ineffective Marketing Strategy
problems.description: Without a coherent strategy, marketing spend can be wasted. This could mean up to 30% of your budget is not driving returns.

problems.title: Low Engagement
problems.description: Low social media engagement results in missed connections with potential customers, costing up to 20% in potential revenue.

problems.title: Lack of Technological Advantage
problems.description: Not leveraging technology means falling behind competitors, potentially losing 15% of market share.

proposal2.solutionIntro: Let's address these losses with targeted solutions.

solutions.title: Creative: Elevating your brand
solutions.description: We craft engaging brand stories that resonate and convert. This will directly address Acme Corp's brand awareness and messaging challenges.

solutions.title: Strategy: Seeing the bigger picture
solutions.description: Our strategic insights will streamline your marketing efforts, ensuring every dollar spent is a dollar well-invested.

solutions.title: Communication: Changing perceptions
solutions.description: We'll refine your messaging to ensure it consistently reflects your brand's core values.

solutions.title: Technology: Using technology to gain advantage
solutions.description: Enhancing your digital presence with the latest technology can reduce bounce rate and improve user experience.

proposal2.whyUsIntro: Here's why Ascender is the perfect partner for Acme Corp.

whyUsCards.title: Holistic Approach
whyUsCards.description: We see the bigger picture and provide solutions that are comprehensive and effective.

whyUsCards.title: Innovative Solutions
whyUsCards.description: Our team leverages cutting-edge technology to keep you ahead of the competition.

whyUsCards.title: Creative Excellence
whyUsCards.description: We craft creative solutions that elevate your brand and captivate your audience.

whyUsCards.title: Proven Track Record
whyUsCards.description: Our results speak for themselves, with numerous satisfied clients experiencing growth.

proposal2.teamIntro: Meet the team that's ready to elevate Acme Corp.

team.name: Emma Dinmore
team.bio: Emma leads strategy and client relationships, ensuring every project aligns with client goals and exceeds expectations.

proposal2.processIntro: What Working With Us Looks Like

process.title: Discovery & Strategy
process.description: Understanding your brand and setting strategic goals.

process.title: Creative Development
process.description: Creating compelling brand narratives and visuals.

process.title: Implementation
process.description: Bringing strategies to life with precision and creativity.

Our speciality lies in shaping the way brands communicate, elevating them to be more, to achieve more. We believe that creativity and design driven by intelligent and actionable strategy is what will set your business apart.
